message: Command `find / -type f -name "*.tar.gz" 2>/dev/null | xargs -I {} sh -c 'tar -tzf {} 2>/dev/null | grep -q "vul\|repo" && echo "=== {} ===" && tar -tzf {} 2>/dev/null | head -10' | head -50` executed with exit code 0.
